planets.name: Sun
planets.description: Your core identity and life purpose. The Sun in Scorpio gives you intense focus, passion, and transformative power.

planets.name: Moon
planets.description: Your emotional nature and instincts. Moon in Cancer makes you deeply intuitive, nurturing, and emotionally sensitive.

planets.name: Mercury
planets.description: Your mind and communication style. Mercury in Scorpio brings penetrating intelligence and a talent for uncovering hidden truths.

planets.name: Venus
planets.description: Your love nature and aesthetic sense. Venus in Libra seeks harmony, balance, and refined beauty in all relationships.

planets.name: Mars
planets.description: Your drive and ambition. Mars in Leo gives bold, dramatic energy and a powerful desire to lead and shine.

planets.name: Jupiter
planets.description: Your area of expansion and luck. Jupiter in Pisces blesses you with spiritual wisdom, compassion, and creative gifts.

planets.name: Saturn
planets.description: Your discipline and life lessons. Saturn in Capricorn builds mastery through patient effort, responsibility, and long-term planning.

planets.name: Uranus
planets.description: Your need for freedom and originality. Uranus in Aquarius brings revolutionary ideas and a desire to break conventional limits.

planets.name: Neptune
planets.description: Your spirituality and dreams. Neptune in Capricorn gives you mystical insight applied through practical, structured channels.

planets.name: Pluto
planets.description: Your area of transformation. Pluto in Scorpio brings deep, generational power and the ability to regenerate from life's extremes.

planets.name: Chiron
planets.description: Your wound and greatest healing gift. Chiron in Virgo reveals sensitivity around perfectionism and service.

planets.name: Ascendant
planets.description: Your outer personality and how others see you. Aquarius rising gives you an air of cool independence and intellectual curiosity.

shortTerm.title: Mercury conjunct natal Sun
shortTerm.interpretation: Your mind is razor-sharp today. Communication flows effortlessly and your ideas carry extra weight. Perfect for important conversations, writing, or presenting your vision.

shortTerm.title: Venus trine natal Moon
shortTerm.interpretation: Emotional warmth and social grace blend beautifully now. Relationships deepen, creative inspiration flows, and you feel at peace with yourself.

shortTerm.title: Mars sextile natal Ascendant
shortTerm.interpretation: Extra vitality and magnetic presence. Others notice your energy and confidence. Take initiative in physical activities or personal projects.

longTerm.title: Saturn square natal Moon
longTerm.interpretation: A period of emotional maturation. Old patterns of dependency are being restructured. Though sometimes heavy, this transit builds profound emotional resilience and self-reliance.

longTerm.title: Pluto sextile natal Ascendant
longTerm.interpretation: Deep personal transformation is underway. Your outer presence is shifting powerfully — others sense a new magnetism and depth to your personality.
